accounts.name: bettor
docs: Rent returns to the bettor (who paid for the account at commit).

accounts.name: owner
docs: Rent returns to the house owner.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Only the rent payer may reclaim it.

accounts.name: house_filters
docs: no policy published (offer everything). Enforced in the handler.

accounts.name: cranker
docs: Permissionless cranker; earns one keeper reward.

accounts.name: commit_print
docs: Merkle-verified print prevailing at commit time (see prove_print).

accounts.name: target_print
docs: Merkle-verified first print at/after target (commit + 15s).

accounts.name: cranker
docs: Permissionless cranker; pays the print account rent (reclaimable via
close_print once the print is no longer needed).

accounts.name: odds_root
docs: in the handler (owner + derived key).

accounts.name: cranker
docs: Anyone may crank a refund; pays the tx fee, receives nothing.

accounts.name: bettor_token
docs: Full escrow goes back to the bettor.

accounts.name: cranker
docs: Permissionless cranker; earns one keeper reward.

accounts.name: bettor_token
docs: Winning payout destination — must belong to the bettor.

accounts.name: cranker
docs: Permissionless cranker; earns one keeper reward.

types.name: Bet
docs: A bet through its whole lifecycle (single fixed-size account, no realloc).
Seeds: ["bet", bettor, nonce le].

fields.name: reserved
docs: floor(stake * odds_cap / 1000), reserved on the exposure at commit.

fields.name: start_time_ms
docs: Fixture kickoff (ms). Hackathon: supplied by the SDK at commit (spec note A).

fields.name: keeper_rewards_remaining
docs: Keeper rewards still escrowed (starts at 2: fill + settle/void).

fields.name: fill_odds
docs: Final odds (x1000) after worse-of-two, spread/skew, odds_cap clamp.

fields.name: payout
docs: floor(stake * fill_odds / 1000).

types.name: Config
docs: Global protocol configuration. Seeds: ["config"].

fields.name: treasury_vault
docs: Token account (authority = config PDA) receiving protocol fees.

fields.name: escrow_vault
docs: Token account (authority = config PDA) holding bettor escrow between commit and fill/refund.

fields.name: txoracle_program
docs: The txoracle program our fills/settlements CPI into.

fields.name: keeper_reward
docs: Flat USDC reward paid per successful crank (prove / fill / settle / void).

fields.name: commit_delay_ms
docs: target_ts = commit_ts + commit_delay_ms (spec: 15_000).

fields.name: staleness_window_ms
docs: Commit print must satisfy: commit_ts - staleness_window_ms <= odds.ts <= commit_ts.

fields.name: fill_tolerance_ms
docs: Target print must satisfy: target_ts <= odds.ts <= target_ts + fill_tolerance_ms.

fields.name: commit_expiry_ms
docs: refund_commit allowed once now > target_ts + commit_expiry_ms.

fields.name: void_after_ms
docs: void_bet allowed once now > start_time + void_after_ms.

types.name: FixtureExposure
docs: Per (house, fixture) exposure book. Seeds: ["exposure", house, fixture_id le].
Lazily created at first commit.

fields.name: liability
docs: Potential payout per outcome (0 = part1, 1 = draw, 2 = part2).
Pending commits count gross `reserved`; trued down to actual payout at fill.

fields.name: stakes_collected
docs: Stakes collected from filled bets on this fixture (moved into the house vault).

fields.name: locked
docs: max(liability) - stakes_collected, floored at 0. Portion of the vault reserved here.

fields.name: open_bets
docs: Open (non-terminal) bets referencing this exposure; gates close_exposure.

types.name: Frontend
docs: Registered frontend integrator. Seeds: ["frontend", owner].

fields.name: fee_vault
docs: Token account (authority = frontend PDA) receiving frontend fees.

types.name: House
docs: An individual LP "house". Seeds: ["house", owner, house_id le].

fields.name: vault
docs: Token account (authority = house PDA) holding the house's collateral.

fields.name: odds_cap
docs: Max odds this house pays, x1000. Bounds the collateral reserved per commit.

fields.name: max_risk_per_fixture
docs: Caps `locked` on any single fixture.

fields.name: max_total_risk
docs: Caps `total_locked` across all fixtures.

fields.name: total_locked
docs: Sum of `locked` across fixtures. Vault invariant: vault.amount >= total_locked.

types.name: HouseFilters
docs: Optional per-house offer policy. Seeds: ["filters", house]; lazily created
by `set_house_filters`; absence = the house offers everything.
A fixture is offered iff BOTH rules pass:
competitions: if `competition_allow` -> CompetitionId must be listed,
else -> must NOT be listed  (empty deny list = all comps)
fixtures:     same shape over FixtureIds
Enforcement: the fixture rule is enforced ON-CHAIN at commit (fixture_id
is a commit argument). The competition rule is honored by the off-chain
router only — a fixture's competition is feed metadata the program cannot
verify without a fixture Merkle proof (spec note A / stretch goal).

fields.name: competition_allow
docs: true = offer ONLY listed competitions; false = all EXCEPT listed.

fields.name: fixture_allow
docs: true = offer ONLY listed fixtures; false = all EXCEPT listed.

types.name: ProvenPrint
docs: A Merkle-verified StablePrice print, persisted by the permissionless
`prove_print` crank. Shared by every bet filling against this print —
this is what lets `fill_bet` consume TWO prints without carrying two
~770-byte proofs in one transaction (impossible within the 1232-byte
tx limit). Seeds: ["print", fixture_id le, ts le].

fields.name: ts
docs: Record timestamp (ms) — Merkle-bound, drives all window checks.

fields.name: prices
docs: Demargined fair odds x1000 per outcome (part1, draw, part2).

fields.name: payer
docs: Rent payer (may close the account later).

types.name: ScoreStat
docs: The on-chain representation of a single, provable key-value statistic.
This is the leaf of the inner-most Merkle tree.

types.name: ScoresBatchSummary
docs: The summary for a single fixture's scores events within a 5-minute batch.
This contains the root of the sub-tree of all events for that fixture.
